name: O-(2,4-dichlorophenyl)-O-methyl-isopropylphosphoramidothioate
description: O-(2,4-dichlorophenyl)-O-methyl-isopropylphosphoramidothioate (DMPA) is under investigation for the treatment and health services research of HIV, Lactation, Contraception, Postpartum Depression, and Immune Cells (Mucosal and Systemic). DMPA has been investigated for the prevention, treatment, and basic science of Weight and Microbiota.
